articles.author: Joe Perez
articles.title: FOX Brings Viewership Options, Technology to Belmont - BloodHorse
articles.description: There is a narrative that the Thoroughbred industry is in decline. But if recent viewership numbers of Triple Crown races are any indication, that narrative is wrong. FOX Sports looks to continue the upswing with the June 6 Belmont Stakes (G1).
articles.content:
There is a narrative that the Thoroughbred industry is in decline. But if recent viewership numbers of Triple Crown races are any indication, that narrative is wrong.

articles.author: Zack Whittaker
articles.title: Filtr is a new privacy tool that blocks ads in almost every iPhone and Mac app - TechCrunch
articles.description: This popular ad blocker app for iPhones, iPads, and Macs can now block ads from loading inside apps, including web browsers, thanks to a new feature in the latest Apple software.
articles.content: Using an ad blocker is good for your security, privacy, and even the FBI recommends them to defend from online harms. But as much as ad blockers are great for cleaning up your browsing experience, th… [+4692 chars]
